title: NIST Research Library
description: Welcome to the NIST Research Library and Museum (Library). The Library is responsible for creating, maintaining, and disseminating a NIST knowledge base which supports the research and administrative needs required to fulfill the scientific, engineering, and technical mission of NIST.
